item.title: 7 Essentials for Learning TypeScript
item.description: TypeScript is my preferred langauge for writing front-end code or anything node.js. I have been saved by the Type System numerous time. It has helped me track down potential errors which would have only surfaced during runtime. I think there is value in learning TypeScript and I strongly recommend to anyone who writes front-end code. I was recently mentoring a junior programmer and I created a list of things I felt he should now.
